title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Akkadian Wisdom Literature
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Akkadian Wisdom Literature.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Akkadian Wisdom Literature.

translation.text: From 'Akkadian Wisdom Literature': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
